    Class
    Description
    final class 
    NetPcap
    High-level packet capture and protocol dissection API.

    Method
    Description
    BaseNetPcap
    BaseNetPcap.perror(String prefix)
    Prints error message to stderr.
    BaseNetPcap
    BaseNetPcap.setBufferSize(int bufferSize)
    Sets the kernel buffer size for the capture.
    BaseNetPcap
    BaseNetPcap.setDatalink(int dlt)
    Sets the data link type for the capture.
    BaseNetPcap

    Sets the data link type.
    BaseNetPcap

    Sets the data link type using an Optional.
    BaseNetPcap
    BaseNetPcap.setDirection(int dir)
    Sets the capture direction.
    BaseNetPcap
    BaseNetPcap.setDirection(com.slytechs.sdk.jnetpcap.constant.PcapDirection dir)
    Sets the capture direction.
    BaseNetPcap
    BaseNetPcap.setDirection(Optional<com.slytechs.sdk.jnetpcap.constant.PcapDirection> dir)
    Sets the capture direction using an Optional.
    BaseNetPcap
    BaseNetPcap.setFilter(com.slytechs.sdk.jnetpcap.BpFilter bpfProgram)
    Sets the BPF filter program.
    BaseNetPcap
    BaseNetPcap.setFilter(Optional<com.slytechs.sdk.jnetpcap.BpFilter> bpfProgram)
    Sets the BPF filter using an Optional.
    BaseNetPcap
    BaseNetPcap.setImmediateMode(boolean enable)
    Enables or disables immediate mode.
    BaseNetPcap
    BaseNetPcap.setNonBlock(boolean nonBlock)
    Enables or disables non-blocking mode.
    BaseNetPcap
    BaseNetPcap.setPromisc(boolean promiscuousMode)
    Enables or disables promiscuous mode.
    BaseNetPcap
    BaseNetPcap.setRfmon(boolean rfMonitor)
    Enables or disables monitor mode (wireless).
    BaseNetPcap
    BaseNetPcap.setSnaplen(int snaplen)
    Sets the snapshot length.
    BaseNetPcap
    BaseNetPcap.setTimeout(int timeoutInMillis)
    Sets the read timeout in milliseconds.
    BaseNetPcap

    Sets the timestamp precision.
    BaseNetPcap

    Sets the timestamp type.
    BaseNetPcap

    Sets the uncaught exception handler.
